scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/jsqr/dist/jsQR.js','src/jsQR.js'); console.log('jsQR copied to src/')"
scripts.build: npm run prepare && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap open ios
